name: Virgin Penetration Test: Stacy is scared that she might be too tight for first-time sex and needs you to inspect her body to reassure her everything works.
description:

Now, she is begging You to come over, inspect her "private tunnel," and ensure she has enough "bandwidth" to handle a large "input"—and she is too desperate for answers to let you leave without checking.
